title: Good overall
review_text: A little overwhelming for me as a single elderly woman. There is so much that needs to be done other than buying a home. I believe I've got most of it done but it has taken some time. I think the o ly disappointment I experienced was the new home owners meet. All the info given was great, but I thought I would get a chance to meet new neighbors. I think it would have been nice for people to introduce themselves and share a little.

title: Excellent, knowledgeable and responsive
review_text: Our experience exceeded our expectations. The team was knowledgeable, responsive and followed-up on everything from questions to warranty inquiries. Would 10/10 buy a Shea home again and recommend to friends and family

title: Overall great experience!
review_text: This is our second Shea home! Our whole process has been exceptional! Our sales associate, Jasmine, was amazing! Ryan, our project manager, takes so much pride in the work he and his team do and it shows everywhere. Also, his communication was so refreshing through the whole building process. Ryan, our warranty specialist, has also been fantastic! He is so responsive to our needs, always very pleasant and knowledgeable. Beyond words, an overall fantastic experience! The whole team is wonderful! Thank you, Shea!

title: How we found Shea
review_text: We saw something on Zillow that made us want to visit. Setting up the appointment was difficult as we were unable to connect with anyone to confirm the appointment. But, we came out to the sales office anyway. Lupita could see that an appointment had been made online, but not with her. No problem. She showed us around and we saw all the open homes that were available to us. We fell in love!

title: Incredible Buying Experience
review_text: This has been one of the best buying experiences I have ever had. This is my fourth purchase of a home (first time buying new). From the beginning with the salespeople to currently working with the warranty folks, the level of customer service has been incredible, and everything has gone as promised. I am extremely happy with the quality of my home and community. Definite shout out to Elizabeth for her top-notch support, communication & professionalism during the sales process. Shea's attention to detail is unmatched, which leads me to their warranty team. Paris and Rudy could not bemore accommodating. Their level of customer service is the reason I would never hesitate to buy another home from Shea. They want everything perfect and they have delivered on it from the start. Paris has been fantastic with her communication and speed of execution. She has exceeded all of my expectations. I can't thank her enough for all of her efforts. Bottom line is Shea treats you like family which is the greatest compliment I can give them.

title: We Love Our Home!
review_text: The entire process from purchase to closing with Shea Homes was great. Everyone was available to ask questions throughout the process, and everyone from sales to the builders were friendly and accommodating to our needs. We were never told "no" by any of the teams. They wanted us to be happy and were glad to accommodate our requests. We absolutely love our home and we are very impressed with the workmanship. Whenever we have friends stop by, they are blown away with how nice it is. We will continue to recommend Shea Homes....

title: Matt was excellent
review_text: Excellent service from everyone on team

title: Review
review_text: Great for all; buying experience, working with the sales representative and all maintenance addressed at 1 month.

title: Steve
review_text: It was such a great process from initial deposit to move-in. Everyone involved, Melba, Vee, Michael, were awesome. We are so happy to be living here.

title: Superior Service from Start to Close of Escrow!
review_text: It doesn't get any better than Josh, Bernadette and Lupita explaining, answering questions, selling, assisting you with paperwork, financial experts, compassionate and professional help through out the buying a Shea Home. You experience World Class treatment from the day you go into the sales office to get information, a brochure, veiw the models or get your keys to your new Shea Home which in my opinion is the best quality product and warranty on the market.

title: Smooth and positive!
review_text: Overall, the home buying experience was smooth and positive. The progress was well organized., and communication was clear and timely. We appreciated the support and guidance throughout each stage, which made the experience reassuring and efficient.

title: The best experience at every step!
review_text: We are Realtors and have just purchased a home in Ventura, CA from Shea. Every person we have dealt with has been exceptional. From Kathy, the amazing sales rep, to Vince, the construction supervisor, to Will, the warranty specialist, the care and responsiveness have been unmatched. The home is beautiful. The community plan is thoughtful and charming. This has been a 10+ experience.

title: Very Professional Sales Approach
review_text: We have been interested in Trilogy for a long time and now that they built a destination in our area we decided to make the move. Every Trilogy we have visited has provided a professional sales experience with only as much of their involvement as we wanted and no overbearing presence. Jessica at Nevina Trilogy was a joy to work with - the whole process was efficient and enjoyable, even when we changed our minds halfway through and swapped homes. We are enjoying our new home and buying it was a pleasant experience.

title: Excellent from sales through warranty review
review_text: The entire sales team worked together so we were always helped no matter when we came to look. With so many different homes to see it took several visits and we ended up working with Josh on the Duplexes, Bernadette on the homes and then when we didn’t find what we were looking for Chris suggested the Rooftops, which was a perfect fit! Then on delivery, Octavio spent a lot of time explaining everything and how it all worked. At the one month review Octavio went over the very few items we had and he had Jonathon took care of them, explaining what he did and checking to see if I was happywith it. Octavio has been so help since we moved in answering our calls and texts quickly!

title: A Seamless and Positive Homebuying Experience with Shea Homes
review_text: We had a great experience buying our home through Shea Homes. From start to finish, the process was smooth, transparent, and well-organized, with a team that was responsive, professional, and genuinely supportive. The quality of the home and attention to detail exceeded our expectations, and we felt well guided at every step of the journey.

review_text: Everything about Shae stands for customer service. The entire team, including sales, construction, warranty, and everyone else that were involved directly with me have been professional, courteous, and always willing to listen and help. We love our new home!

review_text: We had a great experience with Shea. They made some promises during the sales process, and they've lived up to every word post sales. Home is beautiful and well constructed.

review_text: Shea Homes did a great job on our home. Jacob, our field supervisor, was amazing through the entire process. Enjoyed working with him. Need to improve on this.

review_text: Buying your first home is supposed to be stressful and it was a little, but all the people at Shea Homes made the process as easy as possible and quite enjoyable.

title: Will only buy from Shea Homes in the future
review_text: The quality and attention to detail throughout the whole homebuying process has been outstanding. A truly wonderful purchase experience

title: Rocky at first, but worth the wait
review_text: Despite a nearly 4 year long process to move up on the "list" with a less-than-transparent home buying experience, I was finally fortunate enough to be "picked" to purchase a home. I purchased in 9/2024 and closed in 7/2025, which is the exact amount of time that Shea projected. Once in, the home is beautiful and exceeds my expectations which is quite hard to do! It looks alot bigger inside with the walls up rather than framed. There were several issues that I found (despite 4 or 5 sign-offs by Shea and the City) like the ducts not working with the thermostat and an overhead light beingplaced in the wrong place that Shea eventually fixed. There were also lots of paint touchups needed, a few plumbing/sink/shower issues, refrigerator issues, scratched floor boards that needed to be replaced, and other items that required Shea to fix. While they were all eventually fixed, it was a very painful process to work with the warranty employee and way too stressful. Now that the fixes are almost all complete, I can finally exhale and enjoy the house without workmen. The actual neighborhood is incredible - everyone is so happy to have gotten the opportunity to purchase a home that they are so friendly and happy to be here. Putting my prior 4.5 year journey aside, I am so happy to have purchased a Shea Home and it's gorgeous. I am 100% happy that I didn't settle for another house in the area and waited for this home. I would do it again.

title: Thrilled With Our New Home and the Builder’s Team
review_text: Our experience with this builder has been excellent from start to finish. From the initial purchase through the final move-in, every step of the process was clear and well-organized. The builder’s team was responsive, followed through on their promises, and made us feel supported the entire way. The quality of our new home is outstanding—the craftsmanship, attention to detail, and overall value exceeded our expectations. We truly feel confident that we made the right choice, and we would recommend this builder to anyone looking for a trustworthy, reliable, and high-quality home buyingexperience.

title: Best home building experience.
review_text: This is the third home my wife and I have had built. This has been by far the best experience we have had. The Shea team was excellent throughout the entire process. We could not be happier.

review_text: The whole home buying process with Shea Homes was so smooth..Bailey and her crew addressed all issues before closing. And I received great customer service from both Bailey and Hanna along the way. They have been a pleasure to work with. Shea Homes is top notch. I am now living in my dream home.

The on-site inspection team was thorough and helpful during the walkthrough, and the customer service team has also been responsive and supportive. title: Love the new house in Bickford Ranch
review_text: Trilogy at Bickford ranch has a great location on top of a hill. You get the feeling you are out in the country surrounded by open areas. We have all the amenities within a few miles. Come and look for yourself. The people are great.

title: Buying a Shea Home Exceeded our Expectations
review_text: Meeting Linda and Destiny in the Shea center was a great and helpful start for the entire experience. They were patient, informative, and always available. We loved the design of the homes, the extra care given to building materials, and the quality of the home compared with the many other builders that we toured. People always talk about their "dream home" - and we feel like we finally found ours.

title: Miss
review_text: Shea Homes sales representatives are exceptional. They are professional and efficient. My emails and text messages are always responded within minutes. Shea Homes also provided complimentary white glove services to setup each systems. I believe this new property has great potential in value.

title: Everyone was very responsive
review_text: We are very pleased with our home and the Shea homes staff.

title: Fantastic Home, Well Built, Excellent After Sales Service!
review_text: We recently built a Stonehaven in the Canyons. James was our Field Supervisor and Jill is our warranty specialist. James has great attention to detail and even one of the Douglas County housing inspectors told me : "this team at the Canyons builds some of the best homes I've ever seen". The fellow from CDI (a free Shea service) got all our locks, garage doors, HVAC, and light dimmers talking to one another, loaded them on our phones, and connected to Alexa. At our one month warranty check in , Jill got the 3 minor issues we had resolved quickly. We love our house, our neighbors are great andShea is so well organized and professional.

title: Excellent quality and attentive service from start to finish
review_text: We had a fantastic experience with Shea Homes. The quality of the home is outstanding—every detail was thoughtfully designed and precisely executed. From materials to finishes, you can really feel the craftsmanship. What impressed us even more was their responsiveness after the closing. The warranty team is professional, friendly, and truly committed to making sure everything is just right. It’s clear Shea cares not just about building great homes, but also about taking care of their homeowners long-term. Highly recommended!

title: Top notch sales, construction and post-construction warranty staff
review_text: Troy, Kristine and Laura have done a great job in quickly responding to and addressing issues that arose once we moved in. Tremendous, timely response and resolution of those issues.

review_text: Our experience with Shea Homes has been outstanding. From the initial process of selecting options with Josh, our sales representative, to the construction process with Jeremi, our construction manager, everyone at Shea has been terrific. He was also exceptional at keeping up with even the small details and was very responsive to our needs and wants. Building a home can be stressful, but Shea Homes made it much easier, particularly in our case as we wereliving over 250 miles away. We love our new home and would like to thank everyone involved in bringing our dreams to reality.

title: Outstanding

title: Everything I wanted
review_text: My wife and I settled on Shea homes after vetting all available new builders in Littleton. Their house designs are simple, stylish and very well laid out. Sandwiched between state parks and chatfield lake, the location of solstice neighborhood is one of a kind. Their personnel from sales team and construction managers were all very welcoming and responsive throughout the process. We can say enough good things about our experience with Shea.

title: Amazing team.
review_text: Our experience with Shea Homes has been outstanding from start to finish, and we are absolutely thrilled with our new home in the Aloravita community! From the very first moment we engaged with Shea Homes, Nancy made the home-buying process feel smooth and effortless. She was incredibly helpful, knowledgeable, and attentive to our needs, making sure we had all the information we needed to make informed decisions. Once the building process began, Joe took the lead and was with us every step of the way. His expertise and attention to detail were invaluable, ensuring that the construction metour expectations and the highest standards of quality. Joe was always available to answer our questions and address any concerns, which made the entire experience much more enjoyable and stress-free. Scott also played a key role in overseeing the build, ensuring everything stayed on track and was completed on schedule. We were particularly impressed with how responsive and proactive he was, making sure that any issues that came up were quickly addressed and resolved to our satisfaction. After we moved in, James took care of the warranty work, and he has been absolutely fantastic. He’s been incredibly thorough, responsive, and professional, ensuring that any minor issues we had were handled promptly and efficiently. It’s clear that Shea Homes stands behind their product and values their customers long after the sale is made. Aloravita is a beautiful community with a welcoming atmosphere, and we couldn't be happier with our decision to build here. The quality of workmanship in our home is exceptional, and every detail was thoughtfully considered. We feel lucky to be part of such a wonderful neighborhood. We highly recommend Shea Homes to anyone looking for a new home. From the exceptional team, including Nancy, Joe, Scott, and James, to the overall experience, Shea Homes has been an absolute pleasure to work with. We are grateful for their dedication to making our home-buying journey smooth and successful, and we couldn’t be happier with the results!

title: Trilogy at the Polo Club
review_text: Deciding to move is stressful. Shea Homes makes it as enjoyable an experience anyone could ask for. Joining a 55+ community across the country to be closer to family was a daunting thought. I'm here and loving the community and reflecting on the whole process from touring the models to moving in. review_text: Extremely impressed with the multiple inspections done by Shea prior to our taking possession. The management at Shea did the final inspections! He created a pleasurable experience which doesn’t always happen when building ahome.it was completed in seven months which i think is very good in a post pandemic environment. Then Shea takes it to the next level after we took possession to do a check at one month and then again at five months after we took possession!! They will also do a one year warranty walk through too I’m told. They keep communications open to correct any situation that come up. Our satisfaction has been their priority from day one! title: Overall, my experience with Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder has been nothing short of exceptional.
review_text: I recently had the pleasure of working with Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder for the construction of my new home, and I couldn't be more pleased with the experience. From start to finish, they demonstrated a commitment to excellence, delivering my home on time and surpassing my expectations in terms of quality. I would also like to extend my sincere gratitude to Nissrin Musallam, the COMMUNITY's REPRESENTATIVE, and Ryan Aguilar from the Shea Home Finance/Loan Department, both of whom played integral roles in ensuring a smooth and enjoyable process. First and foremost, theconstruction of my home was completed promptly, which is a testament to the efficiency and professionalism of Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder. Throughout the project, I witnessed the team's meticulous attention to detail, resulting in a home that exudes superb craftsmanship and superior build quality. The materials used were of the highest standard, and the overall finish of the house surpassed my expectations. Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder truly goes above and beyond industry standards when it comes to the quality of their work. Nissrin Musallam, the COMMUNITY's REPRESENTATIVE, deserves special recognition for her unwavering dedication and support throughout the entire process. From the initial discussions to the final walkthrough, Nissrin was always available to address my questions and concerns promptly. Her in-depth knowledge of the project and her genuine commitment to ensuring my satisfaction made a significant difference. Nissrin's professionalism, friendliness, and attentiveness exemplify the exceptional customer service that Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder strives to provide. Although I did not ultimately work with the Shea Home Finance/Loan Department, I would like to express my gratitude to Ryan Aguilar, the loan officer who assisted me during the qualification process. Despite not proceeding with the loan, Ryan was incredibly helpful, providing me with valuable information and guidance with the utmost professionalism and friendliness. His expertise and willingness to go the extra mile truly left a positive impression on me. Overall, my experience with Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder has been nothing short of exceptional. They have delivered a home that surpasses the average standard in terms of both quality and craftsmanship. The outstanding service provided by Nissrin Musallam and the valuable assistance from Ryan Aguilar only added to the positive experience. I wholeheartedly recommend Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder to anyone seeking a top-notch home-building experience with a team that truly cares about their customers. Thank you, Shea Homes® Neo at Mission Foothills Builder, for making my dream home a reality and for exceeding my expectations at every step of the way.

title: No Better Builder than Shea
review_text: The best thing Shea has done is hire Kim and Earl. They are the epitome of customer service and are the backbone of Shea homes in Cane Island. Kim is literally an encyclopedia of everything there is to know about Shea and their floorplans. She has the most amazing memory and the brightest smile. Earl has got to be one of the hardest working individuals in this company. After living in the new house for over a month now, I see Earl going around all the homes to be finished as early as 7am all the way past 7pm some nights. He is so good at his job. Always follows up with whatever I may haveasked him. Always treats me and my family with kindness and professionalism. I initially went to Coventry (the other builder of the section) to shop their homes and tried to tour their models/builds. Tina, their salesperson, hates working past 6pm and complained outwardly to me on two separate occasions. I am self employed working 7 days a week till 5:30 every day. My 25 minute commute gives me 5 minutes to view homes and talk options? God forbid I have to keep her an extra 15 minutes past her work hours all while she potentially could have made some good money if I bought Coventry. Well I didn't. I suppose the housing market was so strong, she wouldn't care if I bought one of their houses or not. That's okay, because the next day, I walked in to Shea's model home and met Kim for the first time. She was more than happy to stay late to discuss their homes. Don't get me wrong, Shea has beautiful homes, but Kim was a huge reason we went with Shea. Our last home was a Lennar build and that was a disaster I wouldn't wish my worst enemy to endure. Kim, Earl, and Shea Homes turned our dream into a reality.

title: Home build in the desert
review_text: This is our third house build (our first Shea build) and our best experience to date. We've built in Austin, TX, Huntington Beach, CA and now here, in the desert. We are used to working with builders and dealing with unexpected delays, materials that are out of stock, water/power not ready to be set up yet and various other challenging situations. The way that the entire Shea team dealt with us during these unexpected and unwanted moments is what stands out the most compared to other builds. Your entire team’s professionalism, personal touch, willingness to listen to us and hear us vent. andgoing out of their way to try to correct problems that were sometimes out of both of our controls, made this experience the best. A special call out to the following individuals that stood out and went above and beyond during this process – Lisa our sales associate who from our first visit spent the time to get to know us, learned what we liked, didn’t like, and guided us in the direction that she knew would make us happy as we built our next home. Even after the sales process and when we had already moved into our new home, she included us in a mixer at the club so that we could meet new neighbors. It was a nice gesture, very much appreciated and yes, she knows us! Ryan our builder who under promised and completely over delivered. He came through each time we had a concern about something, regardless of how small, and made sure we got the home we spec’d out. Richard our warranty guy who spent hours going through the details of the home and answering our smallest questions making sure we were going to be ready when he handed over the keys. title: True customer service experience from a quality builder
review_text: I have a background in construction and built our last house of 20 years with a dear friend. After looking at numerous model homes from various builders, it was obvious that Shea Homes knows how to construct a quality home with workmanship that was far beyond the competitors. I also noticed other builders luring you in with low base pricing, only to see 3 times the typical mark up on upgrades in the design centers. This isn't something we experienced with Shea. Mark ups were very reasonable on upgrades, quality of craftmanship was above par and customer service was outstanding. Even withall the supply/worker issues that Covid brought, Shea stood by the original move in date which was really surprising. I can't say enough about how professional and courteous my Superintendent Jason was and also how our customer service rep James handled everything in stride with a smile. You just don't see this level of support very often these days. It's been over 30 days since our move in date and things are going great. We couldn't be happier and highly recommend Shea Homes.

title: Beautiful home & great customer service!
review_text: When I started looking to buy a home I looked at all homebuilders in the Houston metro area. When I came across Shea homes I really liked the floor plans, and they had some upgrade options that I have never seen with other homebuilders. I had never heard of Shea homes before, so I did some research online and saw that they had good reviews. I came to see the model homes in person and fell in love with one specifically. At that time the lots were not released yet for pre-sales, but I spoke to the Sales Rep. David and he kept me updated on when we could buy. The building process took about 51/2 months and David, Josh, and Jason kept us updated along the way. They are very friendly, respond quickly, and always addressed any concerns we had. The quality of our home is great, and we have a very beautiful home that we absolutely love! I would recommend Shea Homes to anyone.

title: Exceeded my expectations!
review_text: I’m so impressed with the Trilogy team that I have dealt with since October 2020! Many many thanks to Courtney, Sonny, Katie and Melissa, and Larry from Shea Mortgage. I hope I’m not leaving anyone out. I found this team to be professional, courteous and very helpful, especially with the modifications needed during the pandemic. I was living on the West coast and had to complete all my design choices virtually. Courtney answered a ‘thousand’ questions from me and acquired additional pictures of the samples to help me make these decisions without being at the design center. When I walked intomy new home in August and saw everything for the first time, I was thrilled with how well everything turned out! This review would not be complete without extending my immense gratitude to Sonny – the field manager who oversaw the building of my new home – and continues to provide support. No matter how busy Sonny is, he displays a never-ending smile, willingly listens, answers questions, and shares his expertise and knowledge. His outstanding customer service did not go unnoticed; he always does what he says he’s going to do and follows up if there are delays or changes. I am truly appreciative of Sonny’s genuine dedication and concern to make this entire process as smooth as possible and minimize any undue postponements or glitches. His attention to detail is unmatched. Sonny, you have a winner’s attitude, and I appreciate the fact that you take your customers seriously and have the patience to teach an inexperienced single-family homeowner some of the unfamiliar tasks, such as the irrigation system and the workings of GFCI when my clothes dryer lost power. You deserve a promotion! The entire Trilogy team far exceeded all of my expectations! From the bottom of my heart I thank YOU!

title: Virtual home buying experience!
review_text: Excellent experience! I ultimately bought my Shea home the virtual way! COVID-19 has changed many things for us all. After searching different Arizona areas and houses on line, I determined the Wickenburg Ranch development was a good fit. I love the terrain, the hills and mountains, the openness was extremely appealing! Gave me a sense of freedom.! Fortunately when I made contact with Shea homes for “move-in”ready homes, I was connected to Ted. Ted is a terrific person to work with. He conducted virtual tours multiple times on several homes of interest. I have to admit Iprocrastinated and missed opportunities. A few months later, I contacted Ted again and he helped me find a lovely home. Ted is an excellent resource and very patient. TaDa... .. I own a Shea home!! It is well built with modern design features and style! First time I actually saw my home was just before closing! My trust in Shea builders was on target! Thus far no problems or disappointments! How fortunate am I to have chosen a Shea built home! Also, the amenities and program offerings are impressive! I’m not a golfer but I enjoy the beauty of the landscape! Yup- I am happy camper!! Based on my experience, I highly recommend the purchase of a Shea built home!!

review_text: It was the easiest experience one could ask for. The staff was helpful from beginning to end. Actually, they are still hopeful even after the build was finished. Very friendly.

title: Location and home style
review_text: The sales staff, Aimee in particular, was outstanding in their responsiveness and knowledge of the home, the design and the materials/finishes. The lot location is just what we wanted. Our primary difficulty in this purchase was dealing with the policies of Shea Mortgage. NOT the staff, they were really good at working with us. But taking several months to finalize the mortgage qualification process in our particular case was ridiculous. Especially in light of the fact we could easily of paid cash. But, it seems all of those "Hoops" were necessary for them to be able to immediately sellour mortgage after closing. To run the customer ragged as happened was really unnecessary. Had there not been an $8,000 incentive attached to obtaining the mortgage through Shea, I would have gone with my local lender and had it done in 30 days without the added stress and work required of me in providing documentation upon documentation. All that said, we love being a homeowner at Encanterra and look forward to many years of retirement living.

title: New Shea Home in Trilogy Sunstone, Las Vegas
review_text: As a soon-to-be retired professional in my mid 50s, I couldn’t have chosen a better place to begin this next chapter of life than Trilogy Sunstone by Shea Homes. From the moment I first toured the community, it felt like more than just a neighborhood — it felt like a destination built for people who have worked hard, achieved a lot, and now want to truly enjoy life on their own terms. The homes are beautifully designed, with open floor plans, modern finishes, and thoughtful touches that make daily living both comfortable and elegant. I appreciate that I could customize my space to fit mylifestyle — whether it’s hosting family for the weekend or relaxing on my patio while the sun sets over the desert hills. The real magic, though, is in the community itself. The Cabochon Club is the heart of it all — a place where I can work out in the morning, grab lunch with friends, or take part in one of the many social activities. There’s a true sense of connection here; everyone is friendly, active, and genuinely happy to be part of something special. I also love the location — close enough to the energy of Las Vegas when I want a night out, but surrounded by the peace and beauty of Red Rock Canyon and Mount Charleston when I crave nature and quiet. After years of managing deadlines and responsibilities, I can honestly say this is the balance I was looking for — a vibrant, fulfilling lifestyle with all the right amenities and like-minded neighbors.

title: Sales Team was always responsive and proactive !
review_text: The Sales team at The Reserves Lone Mountain was always helpful, responsive and made the process less stressful. Overall I give the sales Team 5 stars. Everyone was always helpful and sincerely cared for my concerns. The only thing that is stressful is that non of the other departments that handle everything after closing do not focus on client satisfaction to level sales did. Don’t get me wrong I do believe in the Shea Homes Product.No home is perfect after completion. But I feel like there should be more organization and communication between Trades and builder during repairs done afterclosing. And this critique is not aimed at anyone in the warrenty department. I understand and am aware they have to follow Shea’s policy. They need to make a system that allows trades to know what needs to be fixed or replaced prior to visit. And trades should take up their issues with builder not the customer when shea sends them for repairs. As it is stressful and feels like a full time job for 1 year warranty process of fixing everything. As someone who has built more than one home. My advice to Shea for my overall critique. FOCUS ON HOW YOU can make the client experience better for repairs. Implement a check system like Camelot prior to closing of repairs important to the customer. Focus more on the clients concerns prior then after closing. This will lead to SHEA enhancing its client satisfaction. As I stated above as someone who has built many homes with a number of different builders. If Shea Corporate! implemented some new things for their employees for the system of repairs prior and after. I truly believe the brand and product would be near or better then competing builders around the valley if they refocused this one aspect seeing is that the product itself is great. But wear and Tear items done during building need to be solved before closing. As it ads overwhelmingly to the one year warranty experience as stated above. I am aware nothing is perfect. But I believe there is always room for improvement. I do recommend the product but I recommend that any items damaged before close be resolved or have a solution communicated prior as well. If that small possible improvement in the system was achieved, I do feel like I’d be able to give a full 5 star review rather then 3. I truly believe that if Shea implemented the improvements I stated above it would lead to even a greater success as a brand. Shea Homes if you Read this ! Out of all your competitors I’ve worked with on new home projects! You currently take 2nd place but you easily could be first if you implemented new policy and procedure that allowed people to move in to their house with there items of concern fixed. And yes it can be done. As I have had a happier experience with Camelot in my post close experience. Your next question why didn’t you build with Camelot again then ? Because I did not like the location of any of the new community locations. They were either where god lost his shoes or in a neighborhood that did not yet feel improved or safe. Back to Shea. Shea is great ! But could be way better if they would take my critique into consideration. Sincerely with Love

title: Shea Prelude at Oro Ridge - Queen Creek, AZ
review_text: What stands out the most about our home buying experience with Shea has been great people and fabulous, easy communication. This started with the realtor for the community, Berry Staub, who is kind and professional, always follows through, and has become a friend along the journey. Good communication continued throughout the build process as we worked with Wyatt and Kaleb - our project managers. This included emails detailing what stage of the build process we were in and also text communication from the PM's that included pictures of completed projects. They were both easy to talk to anddiscuss questions, concerns or just review the process with us; Issues were promptly addressed. At close, we were introduced to the warranty team who thoroughly reviewed how the warranty works, what is covered and what is not, how to register our appliances, and how to report issues, if any, All technology was also thoroughly explained by the Foresight team at a White Glove appointment. There were some unforeseen delays due to some design center choices that were discontinued, delayed, and/or arrived damaged, leading to 3 new design center choices being necessary many months into the build. As these weren't specifically Shea 'errors', yet were more related to stock and availability of items chosen, it is difficult to say that it was a Shea problem. What we would have appreciated being different: 1. An online catalogue of Design Center options that we could review prior to our one-time, 4-hour design center appointment. We were expected to quickly make ALL option choices for our home that were not considered structural (ie: cabinet color/design, flooring, handles, etc.) in this single appointment. This led to many back and forth emails with design and the process ended up taking over 6-weeks to complete the choices and to know precisely what the cost of our home would be. Having a second appointment with the designer -or- having the opportunity to review the choices before the appointment would likely have mitigated this long, drawn out process. As we were responsible to pay for the upgrades chosen at time of design center options being chosen, we expected that Shea would be purchasing these items for our home at that time. This is not the process, though. Items selected were purchased just before the build team would need to install them. 2. Some final details that needed touch-ups prior to close were not completed by our initial close date. In fact, it has been two months since we closed and one of the requested fixes is still incomplete. Although our warranty team and project manager are aware of the issue, the problem still exists. What could have/still could be done differently: follow-up with trades and customer to ensure requested work has been completed. Overall, would we buy from Shea again. Absolutely YES! Our home is wonderful and we look forward to enjoying it for years to come.

review_text: This is my 2nd Shea Home so I knew how stellar & on target Shea is with construction & design. That was how I knew this was to be my Dream Home as Tracy/Julie are amazing guides to home ownership. Loved the email telling me status on construction stages to using My Shea Homes. Design Center helped me create the most beautiful home in look & function. Options offered were wonderful in all levels. The downfall was receiving a home not move in ready as what I signed for - anxiety levels to get internet installed as external wiring from the ext of house not complete for a full month whichmeant I could not get White Glove done and other things, $661 1st water bill all on me as why was the irrigation not checked b/4 as the leak had to be happening b/4 ownership transfer & I have to still work w hoping to get the water district to credit not refund my $661 spent (a day 1100 gallons to then 2200 gallons used by 1 person & a dog) and probably another huge one coming as they bill bi-monthly-why prior to my ownership was this not caught at that amount, and to have water plumbing come in hot when using cold where plumber says its the weather which it wasn't, then White Glove gave missed messages on use a temporary password vs permanent as they did not disclose the change from temp password "breaks" the connection of the Eero wifi extender and even not taking out cardboard in the oven and masking tape which I almost missed on usage. All these issues could have been avoided if the punch list did a thorough run through on function. That was all un-necessary stress, money and time expended particularly myself as the new home owner . Shea builds a spectacular home in presentation, design and construction. Well thought on details and what you offer home ownership. This one fell short on delivery as I am still right now watching out for what may come. I love my home though.

Quality of construction is very good compared to other national builders, there were several workmanship issues related to rippled facia on the outside of the house that become a nuisance eyesore as well as gaps in the roof of the covered porch. The biggest issue to date, 3 months post closing are multiple power failures. I cannot recommend this particular Shea site if the local power infrastructure cannot handle the growth in the area. This must get resolved with the power company as it will force more expense forgenerators to protect the customers home.

review_text: We have experience with Shea and know they are a quality builder, that is why we came here. We're had some minor issues, that are being taken care of. Like the window sills paint comes off easily when the shades are left down, then you pull them up, and all the paint comes off, laving you with bare wood showing. That shows the wood isn't absorbing the paint, so it wasn't primed or something else. Also, the lack of privacy for the homes being so tightly packed, we knew about but once you live it, its quite annoying, even though we have nice neighbors. I can actually here their knives andforks on their plates when they eat dinner, and their conversation while they sit at their table. That is a factor of it being so quite out here. I lived in high rise condo's with balconies near each other and noise kept it more private. But the builder experience, and support staff has been excellent. I highly recommend Shae's construction to anyone.

review_text: Shea Homes did a great job with the sales process, most but not all of their employees were great and accommodating. This being a starter home I was not expecting everything to be amazing but it was not bad. There are definitely some areas where they could have done better such as having gutters over the rear patio door to keep rain from splashing into the home if your door was open. Better quality control for, paint,(there are paint drops on the floor, towel bars, island etc), cabinet install (drawers do not slide well, and the blemishes and wrong install inside the boxes were just coveredwith stickers), the sound transmission across floors and bedrooms is disappointing (can hear someone showering upstairs and water draining in the kitchen from downstairs). Lastly the community planning for the driveways and alleyways is not the best, it is difficult to park into your own garage if you have a car parked on the driveway and your neighbor has one on theirs (no backing space or wide enough turn radius) Other than these items the house layout is great and the features provided are an upgrade

title: Good quality and service at a top price
review_text: Overall, our production home was good quality even though I felt we paid a bit of a premium price for it. As the sixth home we've built, including two custom homes, the workmanship quality was only above average. There are multiple areas where walls are not true or square. Finish work was good, but had several issues they were unable to resolve. Example: base trim in one area is crooked partially because a floor tile is not set correctly. Instead of trimming around the tile, they put on the base and caulked around it. I would recommend a VERY thorough walk-thru to catch everything possiblebefore closing. Although service follow up is attentive and helpful, not everything can be effectively corrected after the fact. Example: we don't want to tear out a wall section, plumb it, replace dry wall, mud, and paint after we've moved in. As a production builder, I would rate them 4.5 on quality and 5 on service. Price is 4.0 because we paid a premium price and didn't get a premium finish.

Their communication and attention to detail made it unnecessary to visit the house during construction, using Teams and FaceTime to view progress and make decisions. The finalhand-over of the house and subsequent follow up has been well-handled and efficient. Shea did very well ! My only suggestion to Shea is to include more "upgrades" as standard or provide an allowance for items that most everyone will want and ultimately order. However, the vendors and design team of Shea was incredible to work with and made the selection process smooth and efficient. All choices were included in our home as ordered. review_text: Overall our experience with Shea was great. The responsiveness of the sales team was a little lacking at times, and they struggled to get timely updates from the construction team and convey that information to us. The close out superintendents were outstanding and very responsive and professional. Our experience at the design center was also outstanding. We were a bit frustrated by certain things being options rather than standard at this price point (i.e. drywalling the garages), and the option pricing for the walk out basement was very misleading in that there is a lot premium for awalkout lot, but then another $48K option that is essentially mandatory for the walkout foundation. The foundation adder really should be rolled into the lot premium to be more transparent about the real cost of a walkout.

review_text: Going through the “lottery” experience was quite new, exciting, even though it took 3 tries. I almost dropped out of the running. But now I’m in a lovely home just right for me. I trusted Trilogy since I chose a home that didn’t have a model available to walk through. My mortgage company worked well with Trilogy. Only comment the upgraded “Shea” shower could be more solid and outside the air conditioning unit of my neighbor is right out my patio door. However I do love all my upgrades.

title: bought model so no contact
review_text: nice to have new house, but tankless water heater has been a major issue

title: Highly recommend the Shea team of David, Richard and Brandon
review_text: David was a pleasure to deal with during the purchase and closing. Richard did a great job managing the build. Brandon has been very responsive to warranty issues and any of our other concerns. Great experience. The only reason why I dinged the quality of workmanship is because I do think they did a poor job finishing our driveway. It looks like a hurried and inconsistent finish which can happen when subs have multiple pours in a day. Again, everyone at Shea that we have dealt with has been a pleasurable experience. I would highly recommend Shea to friends and family, only able to speak onthe amazing team of David, Richard and Brandon, but I would think the other teams would be just as fantastic.

title: Anita
review_text: Overall, we had a pleasant experience purchasing our home at Trilogy. From the initial sales to the warranty department everyone was trustworthy and helpful. The quality of workmanship and materials were good for the price that we paid—-except for the painting. The paint job was extremely sloppy and poorly done. It looked like they barely covered the surface with the paint and there was paint slopped all over the edges of the floors and left to dry. There were obvious parts of the trim that had been damaged and it looked like they repaired it by filling in the bad portions and then left itrough without sanding yet. Parts of the trim looked like they painted over existing dirt and debris from the construction without wiping it off first. The corners of the trim had rough edges, and were not completely painted. Paint was dripped and spilled on my patio bricks. The large glass sliding wall was covered with overspray on the frame. The painters that came out to repair the paint damage did an excellent job. However, it was impossible for them to get the paint off of the bricks on my patio and I was told that they could not get the paint off the edges of my new flooring— that is left for me to do Though they did their best on getting off the overspray my sliding wall frame does not look new. The concrete on my front porch is stained with another substance that isn’t paint. So far that has not been removed.

title: New home
review_text: The agent we worked with was Leslie & she was outstanding from beginning to end. We waited a long time to get notified & the prices of the models kept going up substantially. We love our new house, but there are many flaws in the painting, cabinetry, stucco. Shea seems to do a good job in getting those flaws fixed with Will & Matt.

title: Excellent experience
review_text: It was a great experience buying the Shea home in Dunes. The build quality was top notch, and the mistakes were quickly corrected. We knew this going in because we already bought a Shea home in the past. The sales staff here at the Dunes took care of the preliminary requirements and guided us all through the purchase process. Most commendable was the staff that took care of fixing the construction defects. Isaac was always available to address our concerns and he showed us how to make the most of the features of the house. Overall, it was a very satisfying experience and will buy from Sheaagain after this one.

title: Excellent Team and Quality Building
review_text: Our experience with Shae Homes has been very positive from the moment we walked into the sales office the first time. The sales executive has been an absolute pleasure to work with along with the construction manager. They both were always available to answer our questions and addressed all our concerns satisfactorily. They were always very honest with us when it came to the building process and schedule. During the warrenty period the are also very responsive and has been addressing any warranty issues, which are very few, promptly. The warrenty manager has also been very attentive andcommunicates well. Overall we are very pleased and recommend Shae Homes to anyone looking for building quality home with peace of mind and great service.

title: New to the master community plan.
review_text: As with any new construction you will have and find minor flaws. No major issues thus far. I'm very pleased with the warranty office in their quick and timely responses when I submit work orders. All trades, other than one, have been great to work with. One trade was a no show on a scheduled appointment where we had to wait all day to see if someone would show up after the scheduled time. No phone call or message to us to cancel or let us know they were not showing up. Follow up appointment took several weeks to schedule, so we will see if they show up for this one. All other issues have beenaddressed and/or being worked on. Our warranty specialist has been great to work with and does an excellent job with communicating with us for updates. All employees have been awesome from start to finish and kept us informed along with way. Sales office personnel were very polite and helpful and addressed any concern or question we had right up to the move in date. Many thanks to Melba, Jennifer, Katie, and especially Rome for all of their help and support.

title: Homeowner
review_text: We love our Shea home. We wish our home home would’ve been finished as scheduled. During the delay of our home build, the interest rate started taking a huge hike. Our mortgage payment is now over $500 a month more than originally calculated. We understand the rate hike is not the builders fault, but unfortunately as the delay was happening, we were also watching the interest rates increase almost daily. We are now retired and on a fixed income, so this is very unfortunate.

title: Mostly great-- just several minor issues that still need to be fixed
review_text: My homebuying experience has been mostly great. There are several minor issues identified in the final walkthrough that still need to be addressed after two months. I understand that there is a shortage of labor, supply chain issues, and several homeowners with similar minor issues. Progress is being made.

title: Shea Homes - Chuck, Peyton and Ron have been excellence with my home buying
review_text: Chuck, Peyton and Ron have been excellence with my home buying experience and even with the follow up after I moved into my home. I’m enjoying my home. Thanks Shea!

title: Our sales person, Marci, was wonderful. She kept us informed throughout the building process and was responsive to our questions and multiple requests for information. Our warranty representative responds immediately to our texts and emails.
review_text: Although our experience with Shea Builders has been, for the most part, very positive, there are some issues that still require attention. For example: We were promised that the exterior paint problems would be addressed prior to closing. Two months, the area outside our front door remains unpainted, although it has been scheduled on at least three different times. I don’t understand why the painter has been unresponsive. Ryan has certainly gone out of his way to get this done! Shea needs to pay more attention to the quality of work that some of the subcontractors are performing.Cabinet doors still do not work or fit properly, even though an Oak Craft person has been here to correct the problems. Interior doors don’t close properly, not because of settling or expansion, but due to hinges or plates not being installed properly. Finally, our range hood vent cover is sitting in boxes in our garage, uninstalled, because the installers didn’t know what to do when they came to install it (twice). Items being on back order is one thing. Not being able to install them when they arrive is another. Ryan has scheduled a date in September to get most of the work completed, and I commend him for his responsiveness!!

title: Good construction. Service after sales is stretched.
review_text: I would have given 5 stars for all of the above, but two things need to be improved: 1) The warranty specialist is too busy. He does not respond to requests in a timely manner. Even the appointments for urgent things are two weeks out (or more). 2) It appears that Shea Homes contracted some other company to do the tiles and then seal the tile grout. That company either forgot to seal the grout or didn't do a good job. We have grout coming out even with a sponge and water. The good part is that Shea Homes is responding, but still no resolution after 2 weeks+

review_text: Customer Service Rep was very responsive to schedule. However, arranging sub-contractors for corrections was not timely. Memberships orientation at our club was impossible to schedule. Under staffing issues lack the ability to work better hours to service new members.

title: Shea Homes-Trilogy - The homes are lovely and clearly designed with seniors in mind.
review_text: The homes are lovely and clearly designed with seniors in mind. There is plenty of storage in the kitchen. Every lower cabinet has pull-out trays and all drawers are soft-close. The floor plans are well thought-out. Our only complaint is that there has been no follow-through on some of the items that had to be addressed after close of escrow. The biggest one involved our kitchen island. There are prominent buff marks along the edges where some of the workmen put down their tools and scratched the surface. Someone went in to buff out the scratches, but those buff marks are numerous andprominent. Other than people taking photos of the damage, nothing has been done to fix it.

title: Closing opinion
review_text: Due to supply issues, we were only given one week notice to close. We were ready. That is one thing I would recommend is to have all your paperwork to mortgage company if you are financing, as soon as possible and don’t wait till last minute. Closing went very quickly and efficiently. The mortgage company always wants some type of paperwork last minute. Sometimes it’s duplicates of paperwork we already gave them. That’s pretty normal. Shea Mortgage was very good and would use again if ever needed.

review_text: Overall decent for the price but 2 major issues. - The walls thickness are probably at minimum allowed by the state law, according to another Builder that I have asked. Apparently some builders are trying to save money on materials so they cut back on building homes the proper way. The sound travels easily through the Walls, I mean literally any sound. I could be in the master bedroom brushing my teeth and someone in the kitchen can hear my electric toothbrush!!I can even hear my Neighbors talking at night from inside their house. No, they’re not being loud typical conversation, cuz I canliterally tell. - They claim their homes are energy efficient and windows are sealed pretty tight. Definitely neither are true. Yes they have led lights for all their light bulbs, but that’s about it. If I can smell my neighbors bbq with my windows and doors closed that’s not air tight nor energy efficient.

title: Customer Service was Phenomenal
review_text: I am a first time home buyer and the thought of building a home with all the decisions was frightening experience, so I thought. The team at Shea Homes gave me something more valuable than a home. They gave my wife and I piece of mind throughout the entire home buying experience. From home financing, closing and warranty period. Shea Sales, mortgage, construction and Customer Service all worked as a unified team that made the buying experience exciting, fun, with confidence and yes most of all piece of mind that all the details were being taken care of by Shea. How would you describe thequality and value of your new home? The quality of the home I purchased has been good. There has been some small items that you would expect needed attention but Shea fixes things quickly and it's done right. We have received so many compliments on our new home both exterior and interior. There are two areas I wish Shea would improve on and that is following up with HomePro for the Shea Connect and Wiesenbaker for the design. I felt very confused during this part of the home building process. Meaning, it was difficult to understand the responsibilities between HomePro and Shea when it came to setup and installation and the design process is lacking a true designer that is innovative. The designer we had just gave us basic standard choices and provided very little advice to implement our vision. I think Shea should look at improving the process at the design center. Overall, I am very satisfied and pleased the way my new home was built and how it turned out. If you are looking for a quality builder that does things right, and on-time with quality and great customer service, then Shea is the builder for you. I recommend them to all my family and friends.

review_text: Being a first time home buyer I didn’t know what to expect, there are so many steps and things needed it can be overwhelming at times. Half the home (bones) was already built when we started in oct so it just needed to be customized. During the appointment to customize your home I would highly recommend writing down the names of the tiles and paint colors you pick out as I did not and was given the wrong kitchen backsplash. Since I signed off onthe paperwork assuming i had trust that my choices were correct nothing had pictures of the tiles just names when I signed and I couldn’t change it once it was done now I’ll have to pay for it to be redone. review_text: Overall excellent experience. Our site manager (Billy) was outstanding in communication and keeping us informed on progress. Very pleased with workmanship. Our only complaints related to the planning process with regard to finishes. We would have preferred more customization capability, rather than being limited to “packages” of upgrades. And dealing with the various “designers”, who at the end of the day were really little more than administrative staff, was extremely cumbersome and at times frustrating. And indeed, at the end of the day there were a good number of upgrades that we orderedwhich never made it to the building team’s specifications, causing a lot of extra work on our part doing these separately after closing. But all in all we would still call it a positive experience and Shea generally appears to be a very well organized and honest company providing a high quality product and experience.

review_text: If the homebuyers are going to contract their own landscape company, I would strongly advise them to submit their plans once the framing has been completed. It was a nightmare for us when we moved in trying to get our plans approved. We were not doing anything outside of lawn and a few plants. It took us four attempts to get our plans approved. It really caused a lot of anxiety when we first moved in and for the first month and a half, and we were not enjoying the experience. If it wasn't another tree or bush needed, it was too much lawn, or heighth on mounds, etc. . In measuring(literally) many existing lawns around us, ours was actually smaller in SF. Wendy kept talking about "they" want this or that, and some of her demands were trivial and very frustrating. We did read the landscape guidelines and were not planning anything out of the ordinary for this neighborhood. Aimee our salesperson has been wonderful. I understand why she is successful, because she is there for the buyer as well as the owner.
